form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.03) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 6. Has four wins and six placings from 12 starts from the draw. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 0.8 lengths fourth (17.13) over 300m at this track. Has clocked an exceptional 16.59 Best Time here at the trip. Winning chance with a similar performance.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Murray Bridge Straight to win by one length in 17.16, beating How It's Done. Last start finished 4th on April 10 over 300m at this track behind Lenny Limes beaten 4 lengths (17.02) in a Grade 6. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Backs up quickly after winning by 2.5 lengths at Angle Park (20.33) beating Kim Got Game in a TG1-4W on April 14 three days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and she needs to find another gear.
